title: Yemm
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Update|''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]''}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Yemm.jpg]] |name=Yemm |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], [[Death Star prototype]], [[Maw Cluster/Legends|The Maw]]''[[Champions of the Force]]'' |species=[[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Department of Military Research/Legends|Imperial Department of Military Research]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|It's not time for new business, Yemm.''"''
''"''But, Director!|Tol Sivron and Yemm during the Battle of the Maw|}} '''Yemm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]]. He supervised and provided documentation and legal counsel over the [[Maw Installation]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|I don't think we addressed that contingency either.|Yemm's response on how to rescue [[Wermyn]] on the Maw Istallation|}} In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], he was head of the Maw Installation's [[Administration and Personal Resources Division]]. He was killed along with most of the scientists at [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]] when [[Tol Sivron]] accidentally flew the [[Death Star prototype]] down a [[Black hole/Legends|black hole]] during the [[Battle of the Maw]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Yemm }} [[Category:Devaronians]] [[Category:Galactic Empire science and engineering personnel]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Legal professionals]] [[Category:Males]]
